title: Module 1
content:
Basic principles of electrical machines: Concepts of motoring &
generating action. DC generator: Main constructional features,
principles of operation, types of generators, emf equation,
applications. DC Motors: Back emf, need for starters, types, speed
and torque equation, characteristics of shunt, series, and compound
motors, speed control, applications.

title: Module 2
content:
Transformers: Working principle and elementary theory of an ideal
transformer, constructional features, emf equation, turns ratio,
efficiency, regulation, losses, open circuit and short circuit test, Auto
transformer and Isolation transformer working principle, numerical
problems. Switched-Mode Power Supplies (SMPS): Principles,
types (buck, boost, buck-boost), advantages, and applications in
medical devices.

title: Module 3
content:
Synchronous Motors:  Basic principles, Losses and Efficiency,
Torque equation - Starting methods. Single-phase Induction
Motor: Double field revolving theory, making single-phase
induction motor self-starting, split phase and capacitor start induction
run. Special Motors: Construction, principle of operation, and
applications of BLDC, Stepper Motor, Servomotor and PMSM.

title: Module 4
content:
Overview of electrical safety of low-voltage systems:   Basic
Definitions and Nomenclature -Basic Insulation, Class 0, II, III
Equipment, Exposed-Conductive-Part (ECP), Extra-Low Voltage,
Extraneous-Conductive-Part (EXCP), Grounding System -IT,
TN,TN-C, TN-C-S,  TN-S and  T T,  Electrical Codes and Standards,
Personal Protective Equipment (PPE). Fundamentals of Electrical
Safety: Introduction, Protection Against Direct Contact, Protection
Against Indirect Contact.
